languages.text: Эоганн без объяснений бежал на Футфол, забрав с собой Нунциуса. Нужно найти его и узнать причины странного поступка.
Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.
languages.original_text: Эоганн без объяснений бежал на Футфол, забрав с собой Нунциуса. Нужно найти его и узнать причины странного поступка.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.
Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.
Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

languages.text: Eogunn hat Footfall ohne Erklärung verlassen und Nuncius mitgenommen. Finde den Techpriester und decke die Wahrheit hinter seinem seltsamen Verhalten auf.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn hat Footfall ohne Erklärung verlassen und Nuncius mitgenommen. Finde den Techpriester und decke die Wahrheit hinter seinem seltsamen Verhalten auf.

languages.text: Sans la moindre explication, Eogunn s'est enfui en direction de Castel avec Nuncius. Retrouvez le technoprêtre afin de tenter de comprendre son comportement erratique.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

traits.locale_text: Sans la moindre explication, Eogunn s'est enfui en direction de Castel avec Nuncius. Retrouvez le technoprêtre afin de tenter de comprendre son comportement erratique.

languages.text: 伊奥贡不告而别，带着努恩修斯逃去了落脚港。找到这位技术神甫，查明他反常行为背后的真相。
languages.original_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡不告而别，带着努恩修斯逃去了落脚港。找到这位技术神甫，查明他反常行为背后的真相。

languages.text: Eogunn ha huido a Paso sin dar explicaciones llevándose a Nuncius. Encuentra al tecnosacerdote y descubre la causa de su errático comportamiento.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn ha huido a Paso sin dar explicaciones llevándose a Nuncius. Encuentra al tecnosacerdote y descubre la causa de su errático comportamiento.

languages.text: エオグンがヌンシウスを連れ、何の説明もなくフットフォールに逃亡した。テック・プリーストの居場所を突き止め、彼の常軌を逸した行動の裏に隠された真実を暴け。
languages.original_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

languages.text: Eogunn, hiçbir açıklama yapmadan Nuncius'u da yanına alarak Binliman'a kaçtı. Tekno Rahip'i bul ve bu dengesiz davranışının ardındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkar.
languages.original_text: Eogunn has fled to Footfall without explanation, taking Nuncius with him. Locate the Tech-Priest and uncover the truth behind his erratic behaviour.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, hiçbir açıklama yapmadan Nuncius'u da yanına alarak Binliman'a kaçtı. Tekno Rahip'i bul ve bu dengesiz davranışının ardındaki gerçeği ortaya çıkar.
